positive: A majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette viewed at dawn, featuring sharp, dramatic peaks and foothills. The foreground includes abstracted geometric shapes representing forest foliage and crystalline rock formations. Composition should be centered and balanced, using high contrast between deep indigo/mauve silhouettes and a gradient sky of soft apricot and warm peach. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, modern, and ethereal, suitable for textile printing. Vector art style, linocut print texture, strong clean lines, perfect composition, crisp edges.
